hero.protocol: Your business has a problem you can't see yet.
hero.heading:
YOUR OPERATIONS
ARE BLEEDING MONEY.
hero.subheading: Right now, your business is losing time, revenue, and margin to systems that were never built to work together. Wilbak finds every gap — and closes it for good.

operational_gap.heading: Where Is Your Money Going?
operational_gap.subheading: The chaos you've learned to live with is costing you more than you realize

chaos_tax.title: The Hidden Cost of Disorder
chaos_tax.description: Your team spends nearly half their time on tasks that should happen automatically. Manual entries, broken workflows, decisions made on bad data — each one is a direct transfer from your revenue to nowhere. Most businesses don't see it until it's already cost them six figures.

wilbak_alignment.title: What Happens When We Step In
wilbak_alignment.description: We map exactly where time and money are escaping your business, then build the systems that stop it. Not a patch. Not a workaround. A permanent fix, engineered to grow with you. Most clients see measurable results within 90 days.

testimonies.heading: What Happens When the Chaos Stops

items.quote: I didn't realize how much money we were hemorrhaging until Wilbak showed me the breakdown. $120k saved in year one — and my team actually enjoys their work now.
items.author: James McGough
items.title: CEO, Sterling Logistics

items.quote: In 90 days, the firefighting stopped. No more guesswork, no more chaos. I could finally see my entire operation clearly and make real decisions.
items.author: Rachel H. Ballack
items.title: Operations Manager, Vance Mfg

items.quote: I was running my business on bad data for years and didn't know it. Wilbak fixed that. Now I know exactly what's happening in real time. That visibility alone changed everything.
items.author: Marcus Thorne
items.title: Founder, Thorne Supply

footer.description: We build the systems that keep your business running — cleanly, reliably, and profitably. When disorder costs you money, we stop it.
